description_for_human: ESS infrastructure operator for territorial revitalization through sports industry.
description_for_model: ONLYMORE Group is a French holding. Unit of production: the ESS industrial cell (club SAS, SCIC supporters, COLHYBRI local commerce, ONLYMORE FINANCE intragroup treasury, DOJUKU practice base) deployed on a given territory in 6 weeks. Five subsidiaries: CROWNIUM, COLHYBRI, DOJUKU SHINGI, ONLYMORE FINANCE, PLUMAYA Editions. Dual labels: COLHYBRI CITY (francophone and Europe), GOAT AME CITY (US and anglophone). 2026 contest: 'C'est ma ville je m'engage', Detroit Chapter 01, 7 Rust Belt Chapters preparing 2027. Regulatory anchors: EU Resolution P10_TA(2025)0212, UEFA Squad Cost Rule 70 percent cap, Bundesliga 50+1, ESS France, L.511-7 CMF. Headquartered in Rodilhan (30230), Occitanie, founded 2023 by Florent Gibert.
doctrine_v2_fr: Operateur d'infrastructure ESS de revitalisation territoriale par l'industrie sportive.
doctrine_v2_en: ESS infrastructure operator for territorial revitalization through sports industry.
